zh.Hinckley, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾欣克利
zh.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli是Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli和Muriel de Chappell的女兒，於1074年出生在英國越可爾迪可爾。她和Guillaume II Comte d'Eu至少有4個兒子。她去世於1096年1月在英國享年22歲。

zh-hans.Hinckley, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾欣克利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli是Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli和Muriel de Chappell的女儿，于1074年出生在英国越可爾迪可爾。她和Guillaume II Comte d'Eu至少有4个儿子。她去世于1096年1月在英国享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Busli
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (northern): patronymic or plural form of a medieval personal name Buso, but in some case it may be a nickname from the dialect word buso ‘hole’ and as adjective ‘empty, shallow’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli was born in 1074, in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli and Muriel de Chappell. She had at least 4 sons with Guillaume II Comte d'Eu. She died in January 1096, in England, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli est née en 1074, à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli et Muriel de Chappell. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Guillaume II Comte d'Eu. Elle est décédée en janvier 1096, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli wurde 1074 in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli und Muriel de Chappell geboren. Sie hatte mit Guillaume II Comte d'Eu mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb im Januar 1096 im Alter von 22 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli è nata il nel 1074 nel Tickhill, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli e Muriel de Chappell. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Guillaume II Comte d'Eu. Morì nel gennaio 1096, nel England, all'età di 22 anni.

ja.Tickhill, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒル
ja.Hinckley, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアヒンックリー
ja.Eu, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, Fran: フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエウ
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busliは1074年にイギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルでLord Tickhill Roger de BusliとMuriel de Chappellの娘として生まれた。彼女はGuillaume II Comte d'Euとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1096年1月にイギリスで22歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli(은)는 1074년 영국 요르크실르 티크힐에서 Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli(와)과 Muriel de Chappell의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Guillaume II Comte d'Eu(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1096년 1월 영국에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli nasceu em 1074, em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli e Muriel de Chappell. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Guillaume II Comte d'Eu. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1096, em Inglaterra, com 22 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli родилась в 1074 г. в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli и Muriel de Chappell. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Guillaume II Comte d'Eu. Она умерла январь 1096 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 22 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Busli nació en 1074, en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli y Muriel de Chappell. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Guillaume II Comte d'Eu. Murió en enero de 1096, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 22 años.
